sections.paragraph:
(1) pron. 3 pers. pl. fem. they, those. Gen 41:19 themselves, ipsæ, αὐταί, 33:6 these, with the art. 1Sa 17:28. It often includes the verb substantive, Gen 6:2, כִּי טֹבֹות הֵנָּה; or stands for it, Gen 41:26, שֶׁבִע פָּרֹות הַטֹּבֹות שֶׁבַע שָׁנִים הֵנָּה. Verse 27 Gen 41:27. With prefixes בָּהֵנָּה Levit. 5:22 Num 13:19 מֵהֵנָּה Levit. 4:2 Isa 34:16 לָהֵנָּה Eze 1:5, 23 Eze 1:23 כָּהֵנָּה Gen 41:19 Job 23:14 (like these things = of that kind). כָּהֵנָּה וְכָהֵנָּה Germ. fo und foviel, 2Sa 12:8.

(2) Adv. of place-(a) hither (comp. of הֵן No. II. behold, here, and ה parag. local), Gen 45:8 Jos 3:9, etc. הֵנָּה וָהֵנָּה hither and thither, Jos 8:20. 1Sa 20:21, מִמְּךָ וָהֵנָּה “from thee hither,” i.e. “on this side of thee,” opp. to מִמְּךָ וָהָלְאָה, see הָלְאָה . עַד־הֵנָּה thus far, hitherto, Num 14:19 1Sa 7:12 hither, 2Sa 20:16 2Ki 8:7 used of time, to this time, hitherto, Gen 15:16 1Sa 1:16, etc. Contractedly עֲדֶן, עֲדֶנָּה which see.-(b) here (Arab. هَنلَّ), where ה is merely demonstrative, Gen 21:29 when repeated here, there, Dan 12:5. הֵנָּה וָהֵנָּה here and there, 1Ki 20:40.
